interfaces.name: Operations and Product Console
interfaces.description: Primary browser workspace for configuring banking products, monitoring operations, and managing controlled change.

interfaces.name: Core Banking APIs
interfaces.description: External-facing APIs for product, account, and transaction services used by channels and enterprise systems.

interfaces.name: Migration and Platform Dashboard
interfaces.description: Operational visibility for migration waves, service health, and platform utilization.

interfaces.name: Event and Integration Layer
interfaces.description: Reusable event and integration layer for payments, CRM, general ledger, and surrounding banking services.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Needed to configure and evolve banking products without high-cost core code changes.
Needed to support phased modernization across lending, deposits, payments, and surrounding services.
Needed to move portfolios and balances safely from legacy cores into the new platform.
Needed to keep balances, postings, and accounting events accurate during coexistence and scale-up.
Needed to connect channels and surrounding banking systems through reusable APIs.
Needed to distribute core business events reliably across the target banking stack.
Needed to demonstrate regulated control, traceability, and policy enforcement.
Needed to provide production resilience evidence and operational response signals.

neededCapabilities.capabilityName: Deposit Product and Account Lifecycle Management
neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Needed to support current accounts, savings, and term-deposit propositions on the platform.
Needed to embed payment capabilities into modern deposit-led banking propositions.

interfaces.name: Lending Configuration and Servicing Workspace
interfaces.description: Browser workspace for launching loan products, managing servicing workflows, and controlling exceptions.

interfaces.name: Origination and Partner API Layer
interfaces.description: APIs used by direct channels, brokers, merchants, and embedded-finance partners for origination and servicing actions.

interfaces.name: Portfolio and Unit Economics Dashboard
interfaces.description: Analytics surface for portfolio growth, delinquency, servicing efficiency, and cohort economics.

interfaces.name: Servicing Automation API
interfaces.description: Internal and ecosystem API surface for repayment changes, collections actions, and loan-servicing workflows.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Needed to support configurable digital loan products and lifecycle servicing.
Needed to change rates, fees, and eligibility rules without engineering bottlenecks.
Needed to coordinate direct and partner application flows through a shared backend process.
Needed to support multiple lending channels and embedded origination models.
Needed to keep manual servicing actions controlled as loan complexity increases.
Needed to manage arrears and collections without margin erosion.
Needed to understand growth quality, delinquency, and channel performance by cohort.
Needed to replicate winning product structures across markets and segments faster.
Needed to keep growth aligned with market-specific control requirements.
Needed to scale multiple brands, segments, or market variants on one operating base.
Needed to connect originations growth to margin, servicing cost, and operating leverage.

primaryCustomers.name: VP Product for Embedded Finance and BaaS

interfaces.name: Partner Operations Portal
interfaces.description: Operational workspace for onboarding partners, resolving exceptions, and managing live partner programs.

interfaces.name: Partner Developer APIs
interfaces.description: Public APIs for partners embedding accounts, lending, payments, and servicing flows into their own products.

interfaces.name: Webhook and Event Network
interfaces.description: Real-time event and webhook distribution for embedded-finance partners.

interfaces.name: Partner Performance and Revenue Dashboard
interfaces.description: Dashboard for partner go-live velocity, adoption, revenue contribution, and operating health.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Needed to make new partner launches repeatable and governable.
Needed to isolate and manage many live partner programs safely.
Needed to expose composable banking capabilities to partner engineering teams.
Needed to support real-time partner integration patterns and event-driven operations.
Needed to handle partner exceptions, servicing workflows, and operational visibility centrally.
Needed to keep money movement, balances, and commercial obligations aligned across parties.
Needed to prioritize the partner portfolio based on revenue, margin, and operating performance.
Needed to assemble broader partner propositions from reusable product domains.
Needed to turn reusable banking modules into partner-ready offerings.
Needed to preserve regulated trust as the partner ecosystem expands.
Needed to steer platform investment toward the most valuable ecosystem opportunities.
